savedVisualization.query: source = looma-logs-jaeger-query-* | parse message ".*HTTP/[0-9.]+. (?<status>[0-9]{3}) .*" | where status != '' | stats count() as hits by status | sort - hits | head 10

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-query - Top endpoints called
savedVisualization.description: Top span names — proxies endpoints in jaeger-query
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-query | stats count() as hits by name | sort - hits | head 15

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-query - Span kind breakdown
savedVisualization.description: Spans grouped by SPAN_KIND for jaeger-query
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-query | stats count() as cnt by kind

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-dependencies - Latency percentiles (ms, per 5m)
savedVisualization.description: p50, p95 and p99 latency over time for jaeger-dependencies
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-dependencies | stats percentile(durationInNanos, 50) as p50_ns, percentile(durationInNanos, 95) as p95_ns, percentile(durationInNanos, 99) as p99_ns by span(startTime, 5m) | eval p50_ms = p50_ns / 1000000, p95_ms = p95_ns / 1000000, p99_ms = p99_ns / 1000000

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-dependencies - Top 10 slowest operations
savedVisualization.description: Operations ranked by average duration for jaeger-dependencies
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-dependencies | stats avg(durationInNanos) as avg_ns by name | eval avg_ms = avg_ns / 1000000 | sort - avg_ms | head 10 | fields name, avg_ms

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-dependencies - Trace groups (entry points)
savedVisualization.description: Top trace groups (root services) that touched jaeger-dependencies
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-dependencies | stats count() as hits by traceGroup | sort - hits | head 10

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-dependencies - Throughput by kind (per 5m)
savedVisualization.description: Spans per 5m bucket, split by SPAN_KIND
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-dependencies | stats count() as cnt by kind, span(startTime, 5m)

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-dependencies - Span kind breakdown
savedVisualization.description: Spans grouped by SPAN_KIND for jaeger-dependencies
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-dependencies | stats count() as cnt by kind

savedVisualization.name: jaeger-dependencies - Operations breakdown
savedVisualization.description: Top span names emitted by jaeger-dependencies
savedVisualization.query: source = otel-v1-apm-span-jaeger-dependencies | stats count() as cnt by name | sort - cnt | head 15
